summary: Iteration 63: Product Knowledge Graph (Relationship Mining Engine) Phase 1 - All 13 backend tests PASSED. REQUIRES + BUNDLE relationship mining working correctly. Admin endpoints properly secured. Diameter matching correctly filters valid orthopedic diameters only.
seed_data_creation: None - used existing product_relationships collection (5924 edges)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Knowledge Graph Phase 1 fully functional. Stats: 5924 total relationships (672 REQUIRES, 5252 BUNDLE), 443 products covered (50.7% coverage). Test product slug: variabilis-2.4mm-multi-angle-distal-radial-plate-4-holes-66mm-width-22mm-right returns 24 recommendations (12 must_buy, 12 bundle). Diameter matching correctly filters VALID_DIAMETERS only (1.5-7.3mm range), avoiding false positives from plate widths/lengths like 22mm, 66mm.

public_recommendations_api.details: Returns must_buy (REQUIRES) + bundle (BUNDLE) arrays with product cards, confidence, and reason

admin_rebuild_api.details: Rebuilds graph and returns updated stats. Verified >5000 total, >500 REQUIRES, >4000 BUNDLE

requires_confidence_scoring.details: Confidence values are 0.95 (same-brand) or 0.80 (cross-brand) as specified

diameter_matching_validation.details: Only VALID_DIAMETERS (1.5-7.3mm) matched. No false positives from widths (22mm) or lengths (66mm)

no_mongodb_id_leak.details: No _id field in any API response

regression_related_products.details: Existing brand-level related products endpoint still returns 200
